mapper.select: SELECT * FROM twin_job_schedule_config ORDER BY job_key ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO twin_job_schedule_config (job_key, job_name, enabled, schedule_type, schedule_time, schedule_start_time, schedule_end_time, week_days, poll_interval_seconds, updated_by) VALUES (#{jobKey}, #{jobName}, #{enabled}, #{scheduleType}, #{scheduleTime}, #{scheduleStartTime}, #{scheduleEndTime}, #{weekDays}, #{pollIntervalSeconds}, #{updatedBy}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE job_name = VALUES(job_name), updated_by = VALUES(updated_by)
mapper.update: UPDATE twin_job_schedule_config SET enabled = #{enabled}, schedule_type = #{scheduleType}, schedule_time = #{scheduleTime}, schedule_start_time = #{scheduleStartTime}, schedule_end_time = #{scheduleEndTime}, week_days = #{weekDays}, poll_interval_seconds = #{pollIntervalSeconds}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE job_key = #{jobKey}
UPDATE twin_job_schedule_config SET last_status = 'SUCCESS', last_run_at = #{runAt}, last_success_at = #{runAt}, last_error = NULL, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE job_key = #{jobKey}
